relations.note: Masthead gradient is one specific member of the approved gradient set.
Orientation/usage guidance applies to the same approved gradient set.

effect.reserved_for: approved gradient set (Brand Blue→Dark Navy, Sky Blue→Deep Blue, Sunshine→75% Gold, Golden Sand→White→Light Blue, Golden Sand→75% Gold→Sunshine, Sunshine→light gold masthead)
effect.subject: gradients

quotes: Gradient Specifications (approved set — never invent gradients)

rules.intent: Constrain gradients to the approved palette and prevent ad-hoc gradient creation.
rules.rule_text: Only the approved gradient set may be used; never invent gradients. The approved gradients are: Brand Blue → Dark Navy (#00529b → #011E45) for dark backgrounds and blue masthead/waves; Sky Blue → Deep Blue (#358CCB → #003D74) for blue backgrounds/waves; Sunshine → 75% Gold (#faa31b → Gold @75%) for warm backgrounds; Golden Sand → White → Light Blue (#FEF1C8 → #ffffff → #E6F0F9) for soft light backgrounds; Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine (#FEF1C8 → Gold @75% → #faa31b) for warm light-to-saturated backgrounds; and the masthead gradient Sunshine → light gold (#faa31b → ≈#ffe05c).

quotes: Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end
Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end

rules.intent: Ensure logo mark contrast by pairing it with the correct masthead gradient at its light end.
rules.rule_text: The masthead gradient (masthead.gradient = Sunshine → light gold, #faa31b → ≈#ffe05c) is the gradient to use with the LISRAYA logo mark for contrast, with the mark sitting at the lightest end of the gradient.

quotes: Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).
Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark. Approved values only.

rules.intent: Preserve consistent gradient direction and approved contexts of use.
rules.rule_text: Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown). They are used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark, using approved values only.
